title: Elementary Computational Physics
description:
A complete, executable course in computational physics: Prologue (“A Pendulum, Three Ways”) + Volumes 0–VII — mathematical and computational foundations, elementary and classical mechanics, electrodynamics, special relativity, classical and quantum statistical mechanics, quantum mechanics, and a many-body Coda — closed by a four-notebook Epilogue and an Afterword. Every notebook executes in CI and its validation gates must pass before any page is published.

Read the course at ramador.me/elementary-computational-physics-public. This archive captures the runnable, solution-stripped public mirror. Text is licensed CC BY 4.0; code cells are MIT.
